name: Salmon Tomato Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups bread crumbs or cracker crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Flake the salmon and remove any bones.
2. Combine the flaked salmon, cooked tomatoes, breadcrumbs, melted butter, and beaten egg in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Mix the ingredients lightly with two forks until just combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to an oiled baking dish and form it into a loaf shape.
5. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for about 20 minutes.
